summary: Archived native runtime matrix evidence from earlier QA automation. Active preview review now uses smoke-test checks and concise release-risk notes.
archiveNote: Kept only as historical context. This file is not an H5/H6 blocker and must not be turned into an owner row-by-row task.

completedEntries.notes: Historical release-simulator row-level screenshots/logs and prior launch-smoke screenshots cover the showcase pages. Active release notes summarize remaining risk instead of requiring matrix completion.
